description:
You need to attach PDF files to their corresponding research papers in your Zotero library. Attach the following files from '/home/ga/Documents/PDFs/' as stored copies:
- 'vaswani2017_transformers.pdf' to 'Attention Is All You Need'
- 'lecun2015_deep_learning_review.pdf' to 'Deep Learning' (by LeCun, Bengio, Hinton)
- 'krizhevsky2012_imagenet.pdf' to 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks'
- 'he2016_residual_learning.pdf' to 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition'

targets.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
